name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: False Trail
depiction: A pair of footprints that suddenly vanish
effect: After you move, you can leave behind illusory tracks that mislead trackers for 1 hour 🔍

name: Mind Maze
depiction: An intricate maze overlaying a frightened face
effect: All creatures in a 20-foot radius must succeed on a DC [[14]] Intelligence saving throw or be unable to take reactions until the start of your next turn 🧠

name: Lie's Resonance
depiction: A pulsing rune of tangled threads
effect: All creatures of your choice within 15 feet must succeed on a DC [[15]] Wisdom saving throw or take psychic damage equal to [[2d6]] and be unable to speak truth for 1 minute, effectively imposing disadvantage on Persuasion checks 🧠

name: Web of Confusion
depiction: A tangled spiderweb shimmering with ethereal light
effect: All creatures of your choice within 15 ft must succeed on a DC [[14]] Intelligence saving throw or be affected by the confusion spell for 1 minute 🕸️

name: Crowd's Confusion
depiction: A swirling vortex of faces blending into one
effect: All creatures within 30 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become unable to distinguish friend from foe for 1 minute, causing attacks to roll with disadvantage 🔄

name: Blinkstep
depiction: A pair of mismatched footprints fading away
effect: As a bonus action, teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see

name: Mirage Step
depiction: Footprints fading into mist
effect: As a bonus action, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that is lightly obscured by illusion or darkness 🌫️

name: Evasive Mirage
depiction: A flickering duplicate of yourself
effect: As a reaction when targeted by an attack, impose disadvantage on that attack by creating a fleeting illusion of your location 🌀

name: Bait and Switch
depiction: A card with two identical figures swapping places
effect: As a reaction, when hit by an attack, you can swap places with a willing creature within 30 feet, causing the attack to target the new position instead 🔄

name: Mirage Veil
depiction: A shimmering, translucent mask floating in air
effect: Become invisible until you attack or cast a spell, or for up to 1 minute 🌫

name: Whispered Falsehood
depiction: A mouth whispering into a shadowy ear
effect: Cast disadvantage on the next Charisma (Deception) check you make within the next hour 🤫

name: Veil of Shadows
depiction: A swirling mist obscuring a figure
effect: Cast invisibility on yourself for up to 1 hour or until you attack or cast a spell 🕶️

name: Smoke and Mirrors
depiction: An ornate mask shrouded by smoke
effect: Cast minor illusion at will without verbal components for 10 minutes, usable once per long rest 🎭

name: False Promise
depiction: Two masked faces, one frowning, one smiling
effect: Cast the spell Suggestion at 2nd level, requiring no verbal component and made without expending a spell slot 🗣️

name: Veil of Confusion
depiction: A swirling mist obscuring vision
effect: Choose a 20-foot radius within 60 feet

name: Phantom Echo
depiction: A ghostly double mimicking a spellcasting gesture
effect: Choose a creature within 30 feet

name: Web of Lies
depiction: A spider weaving a glowing, intricate web
effect: Choose a creature within 30 feet

name: False Footsteps
depiction: A pair of footprints leading in two directions
effect: Choose a target within 30 feet—they must succeed a DC [[15]] Wisdom saving throw or be fooled by an illusory sound or image distracting them, imposing disadvantage on their next attack or ability check 👣

name: Silent Tongue
depiction: A mouth with a lock over it
effect: Choose one creature that cannot speak or cast spells with verbal components for 1 minute unless it succeeds a DC [[15]] Constitution saving throw 🤐

name: False Friend
depiction: Two hands shaking, one skeletal beneath the other
effect: Choose one creature within 30 feet

name: Whispered Doubt
depiction: A stylized ear with a faint wisp of smoke
effect: Choose one creature within 30 feet

name: False Footing
depiction: A pair of mismatched boots walking in opposite directions
effect: Choose one creature within 30 feet—its next movement provokes opportunity attacks as if it moved 5 feet closer to enemies it can see 👣

name: Mirror's Whisper
depiction: A shimmering face reflecting a false expression
effect: Choose one creature within 30 feet, they must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be deceived by an illusion of your choice, granting you advantage on your next Charisma check against them 🪞

name: Whispered Lies
depiction: A mouth covered by a finger in a hush gesture
effect: Choose one creature within 30 ft

name: Mirror’s Gaze
depiction: A cracked mirror reflecting a distorted face
effect: Choose one creature you can see

name: Web of Facades
depiction: A network of marionette strings tangled around several figures
effect: Choose up to five creatures in a 20-foot radius

name: Smoke and Shadows
depiction: A swirling cloud of dark smoke
effect: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of thick smoke centered on you that heavily obscures the area for 1 minute 🌫️

name: Echo of Lies
depiction: A distorted reflection in a cracked mirror
effect: Create an illusory double of yourself for 1 minute that mimics your actions but cannot attack

name: Mirror’s Mirage
depiction: A cracked mirror reflecting multiple distorted faces
effect: Create an illusory double of yourself for 1 minute that mimics your movements and distracts enemies

name: Mirror's Gambit
depiction: Two identical faces split by a jagged line
effect: Create an illusory double of yourself that lasts 1 minute, imposing disadvantage on attack rolls against you 🎭

name: Veil of Mirrors
depiction: A swirling fog of fragmented faces
effect: Create an illusory duplicate of yourself that mimics your actions for 1 minute, distracting enemies

name: Confounding Mirage
depiction: An illusory maze twisting in endless corridors
effect: Create an illusory duplicate of yourself that moves independently within 60 feet for 1 minute, granting attackers disadvantage on attacks against you as they target the duplicate instead 🌀

name: False Alarm
depiction: An alarm bell that emits colored smoke instead of sound
effect: Create an illusory noise or visual effect of your choice audible or visible up to 60 feet, lasting 1 minute to distract or mislead foes 🔔

name: False Footprints
depiction: A trail of glowing, shifting footprints leading away
effect: Create an illusory trail that misdirects pursuers, causing them to follow a false path for [[1d4+1]] rounds 🐾

name: Mirror Mirage
depiction: A shattered mirror reflecting multiple distorted versions of one person
effect: Create illusory duplicates of a target within 30 feet, each taking 1 hit point and vanishing when hit, lasting 1 minute or until all duplicates disappear 🎭

name: False Reflection
depiction: A mirror shattering into multiple distorted images
effect: Create illusory duplicates of yourself that impose disadvantage on attacks against you until the start of your next turn 🤡

name: Mirror Trick
depiction: A shattered mirror showing multiple distorted reflections
effect: Create illusory duplicates of yourself that last for 1 minute, causing attackers to have disadvantage on attacks against you 🎴

name: Mirror’s Trick
depiction: A shattered hand mirror reflecting multiple distorted faces
effect: Create three illusory duplicates of yourself that last for 1 minute, each has AC 10 and 1 HP, and impose disadvantage on attack rolls targeting you 🎭

name: Mirror Masque
depiction: A crystal mask that reflects multiple distorted faces
effect: Create three illusory duplicates of yourself that mimic your actions for 1 minute

name: False Light
depiction: A glowing orb that flickers and splits into many
effect: Create up to three illusory lights that shed dim light and can mislead enemies within 60 feet for 10 minutes 💡

name: Mirrormaze
depiction: A shattered mirror reflecting multiple versions of the same character
effect: Creates 3 illusory duplicates of the target for 1 minute, each takes a hit before vanishing, illusions cause attackers to have disadvantage 🎭

name: Veil of Smoke
depiction: A swirling cloud masking a face
effect: Creates a 10-foot radius cloud of thick smoke centered on you, heavily obscuring the area for 1 minute or until dispersed by wind 🍂

name: Crowd’s Confusion
depiction: A swirl of masked faces blending into one another
effect: Creates an illusionary crowd that imposes disadvantage on attack rolls and perception checks for all creatures within 20 feet for 1 minute 🌀

name: Silent Steps
depiction: A pair of footprints fading away
effect: For 1 hour, your movement leaves no sound and does not trigger opportunity attacks, and you have advantage on Stealth checks 👣

name: Fool's Glimmer
depiction: Two contrasting eyes peeking through a cracked mask
effect: For 1 minute, attackers have disadvantage on attack rolls against you as illusions confuse their aim 🎭

name: Chorus of Echoes
depiction: Multiple shadowy figures whispering in unison
effect: For 1 minute, create illusory duplicates of yourself causing attackers to have a 50% chance to target a duplicate instead of you, duplicates vanish if hit 👥

name: Echoes of Deceit
depiction: Multiple shadowy silhouettes blurred around a person
effect: For 1 minute, enemies that attack you choose randomly if they target you or one of your illusory duplicates (up to three), debilitating their focus 🎲

name: Veil of Misdirection
depiction: A swirling veil of smoke curling around a figure
effect: For 1 minute, enemies that target you must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or attack another creature within 10 feet instead 💨

name: Veil of Whispers
depiction: A shadowy figure with a blurred face
effect: For 1 minute, you can cast Disguise Self at will without expending a spell slot 🎭

name: Cloak of the Trickster
depiction: A shadowy cloak slipping between pillars
effect: For 1 minute, you can move through creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain

name: False Steps
depiction: Ghostly footprints leading away from the target
effect: For 10 minutes, tracking or chasing the target requires a DC [[15+Charisma modifier]] Survival check or they lose the trail 🚶‍♂️

name: Whispered Veil
depiction: A shadowy figure covering its mouth while eyes gleam
effect: For 10 minutes, you can cast *Disguise Self* at will without expending a spell slot 🕶️

name: Masks of Many Faces
depiction: A set of shifting masks floating in the air
effect: For 10 minutes, you can change your appearance to any humanoid you have seen and mimic their voice perfectly 🎭

name: Mirror Mask
depiction: A smooth mask reflecting a distorted version of the wearer’s face
effect: For 10 minutes, you can change your appearance to any humanoid, gaining advantage on Deception checks 🪞

name: Eye of Deceit
depiction: An eye with a swirling vortex in place of the pupil
effect: For 10 minutes, you can reroll one Insight or Deception check per round, taking the better roll 👁

name: Whispered Web
depiction: Spider webs tangled with faint glowing runes
effect: For 10 minutes, you can silently communicate telepathically with any creature within 60 feet that you've previously met, sharing whispered lies or secrets 🕸

name: Silent Step
depiction: A pair of ethereal footprints fading into mist
effect: For 10 minutes, your movement makes no sound and cannot be tracked by nonmagical means 👣

name: Fabricated Alibi
depiction: A parchment with false witnesses' signatures
effect: For one hour, any history, investigation, or insight checks related to you or your actions have disadvantage 📜

name: Mirror’s Glint
depiction: A sharp eye reflected in a crackling mirror
effect: For one minute, any attack roll made against you has disadvantage as attackers see multiple illusory doubles 🪞

name: Confounding Glimmer
depiction: A shimmering, distorted shimmer around a person
effect: For one minute, one creature’s movement is erratic—when it moves, roll a d6: on a 4-6, it moves in a random direction instead of its intended path 🔀

name: Mislead
depiction: A shattered mirror reflecting multiple distorted faces
effect: For the next 10 minutes, creatures attacking you must roll [[1d20]] and hit only on a roll of 15 or higher as their attacks are misdirected 🎯

name: Fox’s Tongue
depiction: A sly fox with a sly grin and tongue sticking out
effect: For the next 10 minutes, you can cast Disguise Self at will and gain advantage on Deception checks 🦊

name: Whispering Shadow
depiction: A dark shadow whispering into an ear
effect: For the next 10 minutes, you can communicate telepathically with any creature you can see within 60 feet without speaking 🗣

name: Silent Footsteps
depiction: A pair of shadowy boots leaving no prints
effect: For the next 10 minutes, your movement leaves no sound and no tracks, granting advantage on Stealth checks involving movement 👣

name: Lie’s Echo

effect: For the next hour, any attempt to recall a truth from one creature within 60 feet has a 50% chance to instead recall a convincing but false memory 🌀

name: Mirror’s Whisper

depiction: A shattered mirror showing a distorted face
